creator: andrey@kostenko.name
text:
Sorry, but currently I don't use FreeBSD for any of my computers and can not test it. Can someone remove me from maintainership?  


On Saturday, 21 April 2012 Ð³. at 10:21, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of www/p5-Catalyst-Plugin-ErrorCatcher,
>  
> Please note that PR ports/167153 has just been submitted.
>  
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>  
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/167153
>  
> --  
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org (mailto:edwin@FreeBSD.org)
>  
>
